      • PallyconHttpMediaDrmCallback

        public PallyconHttpMediaDrmCallback​(android.content.Context context,
                                    java.lang.String defaultLicenseUrl,
                                    com.google.android.exoplayer2.upstream.HttpDataSource.Factory dataSourceFactory,
                                    java.util.Map<java.lang.String,​java.lang.String> keyRequestProperties,
                                    PallyconKeyRequest keyRequest)
        Parameters:
        context - context
        defaultLicenseUrl - The default license URL.
        dataSourceFactory - A factory from which to obtain HttpDataSource instances.
        keyRequestProperties - Request properties to set when making key requests, or null.
        keyRequest - keyRequest callback
